title: Review: API idiomaticity round 2
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — all changes are additive derives or cleanup of a no-op serde attr; only breaking change is quota_get return type which has no existing callers.
Confidence: 97% chance of no missed bug. Changes are small, targeted, mechanical (adds derives, removes dead attr, renames type). Tests pass 202/202. Uncertainty: quota fixture tests notFound:null but not notFound:absent.
